com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXStructureNode

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConnectivityObject, IXModuledObject, IXNode, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXStructureNode
extends IXNode
    Interface to represent a structure node.
